paper: A Guideline-Grounded Multi-Agent Framework for Holistic Epilepsy Management

components.Disc: Binary discriminative signal injection (calibrated softmax probabilities from all trained classifiers, presented per-class)
components.RAG: Guideline-grounded retrieval over ILAE 2017/2025, NICE, and AES guideline chunks (cosine similarity retrieval)
components.MT: Multi-turn deliberation — iterative follow-up Q&A between orchestrator and modality agents (max 3 rounds)

key_findings.disc_injection: Primary performance driver: +18.0 pp gain (60.8% → 78.8%) over LLM-only baseline
key_findings.rag_grounding: Task-selective improvement: +0.6 pp mean (78.8% → 79.4%), concentrated on EZ localization (+0.6%) and surgery outcome (+0.8%)
key_findings.multi_turn: Marginal accuracy gain (+0.1 pp) at 2.4× inference cost (273 vs. 647 minutes for full cohort)

results.note: Full MEAF includes few-shot retrieval and per-task calibrated weights beyond the basic ablation variants
